# Nicole's Version — Reference Copy

These files are an unmodified copy of Nicole's repo
(https://github.com/nz278/reaction-diffusion-simulations), pulled in for
side-by-side reference only.

**Do not edit these files and do not import from this folder anywhere
in `core/` or `scripts/`.** This is a snapshot for comparison while
debugging the blank-Turing-panel issue — it is not part of the active
pipeline, and it will go stale (it won't auto-update if she pushes changes).

Active, maintained code lives in `core/`, `scripts/`, `analysis/`.
